title: The Stars
content:
These--the bright symbols of man's hope and fame,
    In which he reads his blessing or his curse--
    Are syllables with which God speaks His name
    In the vast utterance of the universe.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Madison Julius Cawein, titled "The Stars", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
